segment.source: An interactive tab group that switches between multiple rich-text panels behind labeled, optionally icon-prefixed tabs. Use it to organize related content compactly, such as product details, FAQs, or step-by-step instructions, without overwhelming the page. Key fields are the tab style (default or line), an optional heading, the default active tab index, and a panel collection with tab label, rich-text content, and an optional icon per tab.
